stocks.impact_theory: Cooling AI hype and Nasdaq selloff amid broader market correction; economic implications include reduced capex on AI infrastructure; market psychology shifting from FOMO to fear of overvaluation; historical parallels to 2022 tech correction; analogies: like a balloon deflating after overinflation, or overhyped party ending.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Web searches show concerns over AI investment disruption and Nasdaq pullback; X posts mention NVDA in movers but with selloff context; sentiment shift negative amid rotation out of tech.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Avoid long; short for 5-10% gains on continued correction.
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Short position opportunity with potential 7% downside; cover if support at 52w low holds.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Unexpected AI breakthrough news, Fed rate cut boosting tech, high short interest squeeze.

stocks.justification: Strong evidence from market summaries and X movers, but volatile sector.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long for 6% upside on sustained oil >$90; target $135.

stocks.justification: Clear news on oil surge and consistent mentions in movers.
